name: CalendarMonthViewComponent
description: Component representing the month view of the calendar.

inputs.name: focusEscapeFunction
inputs.description: A function that handles escape focus

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: The id of the calendar passed from the parent component

inputs.name: isDateRangeMonthYearFormat
inputs.description: Whether to pick the date range in month year format without picking days

inputs.name: monthSelected
inputs.description: A number (1-12) representing the selected month

inputs.name: rangeHoverEffect
inputs.description:
Whether user wants to mark month cells on hover.
Works only on range mode, when start month is selected.

inputs.name: year
inputs.description: A year the month view is referring to

outputs.name: monthClicked
outputs.description: An event fired when a new month is selected

outputs.name: selectedRangeDateChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time selected first or last date in range mode is changed

methods.name: selectMonth
methods.description: Method for handling the mouse click event when a month is selected

methods.name: setFocusOnCell
methods.description:
Set focus on month cell.
It can be a selected cell, current month cell or first cell in the list
